_meta.author: jzadl
_meta.description: Hackintosh kext + macOS compatibility database for tools.jzadl.xyz/kext-checker. Tested on T480 (Tahoe), T440s. Kexts only — no Quirks, no ACPI, no config.plist.
sources: Personal Hackintosh experience — T480 Tahoe, T440s (jzadl)

macos_versions.name: Tahoe
macos_versions.notes: Last macOS to support Intel. Audio requires OCLP-Mod with lowered SIP. AirportItlwm Ventura build works on Tahoe. macOS 27 will be Apple Silicon only.
macos_versions.oclp_mod_note: OCLP-Mod required for audio. Lowered SIP required (csr-active-config: 03000000).

workarounds.audio: OCLP-Mod with lowered SIP. Do NOT use VoodooHDA.
workarounds.intel_wifi: Use AirportItlwm Ventura build — confirmed working on Tahoe.

macos_versions.name: Sequoia
macos_versions.notes: Recommended stable option. OCLP 2.4.1 fully supported. Broadcom Wi-Fi needs OCLP root patch. Audio works natively with AppleALC.

macos_versions.name: Sonoma
macos_versions.notes: Broadcom Wi-Fi needs OCLP root patch. AppleALC works fine.

macos_versions.name: Ventura
macos_versions.notes: Natively supports Coffee Lake (8th gen) and newer iGPUs. Older gens need OCLP root patches for GPU acceleration.

macos_versions.name: Monterey
macos_versions.notes: Supports Haswell (4th gen) and newer natively. BlueToolFixup required for Intel Bluetooth.

macos_versions.name: Big Sur
macos_versions.notes: Supports Haswell (4th gen) and newer natively.

macos_versions.name: Catalina
macos_versions.notes: Ivy Bridge (3rd gen) and newer supported natively.

macos_versions.name: Mojave
macos_versions.notes: Last macOS with NVIDIA Web Driver support. Sandy Bridge supported.

macos_versions.name: High Sierra
macos_versions.notes: Last macOS with NVIDIA Maxwell/Pascal Web Driver support.

intel_generations.name: Raptor Lake Refresh
intel_generations.igpu_notes: No iGPU acceleration on any macOS. Must use a supported dGPU.
intel_generations.notes: Hybrid P+E core CPU. Requires CpuTopologyRebuild kext.

intel_generations.name: Raptor Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: No iGPU acceleration on any macOS. Must use a supported dGPU.
intel_generations.notes: Hybrid P+E core CPU. Requires CpuTopologyRebuild kext.

intel_generations.name: Alder Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: No iGPU acceleration on any macOS. Must use a supported dGPU.
intel_generations.notes: First Intel hybrid P+E core. iGPU unsupported in macOS. CpuTopologyRebuild required.

intel_generations.name: Rocket Lake / Tiger Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: ZERO iGPU acceleration on ANY macOS. Apple never added Iris Xe / UHD 750 support. No workaround exists. VESA only.
intel_generations.notes: Critical: iGPU completely unsupported. Must use a supported AMD dGPU.

intel_generations.name: Comet Lake / Ice Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full acceleration on all supported macOS versions.
intel_generations.notes: Solid macOS support. UHD 630 very well supported.

intel_generations.name: Coffee Lake Refresh
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full acceleration on all supported macOS versions.
intel_generations.notes: Excellent macOS compatibility. Very popular Hackintosh platform.

intel_generations.name: Coffee Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full acceleration. Minimum gen for native Ventura iGPU support.
intel_generations.notes: Minimum gen natively supported by Ventura+. ThinkPad T480, X280 use UHD 620.

intel_generations.name: Kaby Lake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full native acceleration up to Monterey. Ventura+ requires OCLP root patch.
intel_generations.notes: Great platform. ThinkPad T470, X1 Carbon G5.

intel_generations.name: Skylake
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full native acceleration up to Monterey. Ventura+ requires OCLP root patch.
intel_generations.notes: ThinkPad T460, T460s, X260 very well supported.

intel_generations.name: Broadwell
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full native acceleration up to Monterey. Ventura+ requires OCLP root patch.

intel_generations.name: Haswell
intel_generations.igpu: Intel HD 4600 / Intel HD 4400 / Intel Iris 5100
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full native acceleration up to Monterey. Ventura+ requires OCLP root patch.
intel_generations.notes: Minimum gen for native Big Sur/Monterey. ThinkPad T440s, T440p, T450 iconic Hackintosh laptops.

intel_generations.name: Ivy Bridge
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Full native acceleration up to Catalina. Big Sur+ requires OCLP root patch.
intel_generations.notes: ThinkPad T430, X230 very popular. HD 4000 still works via OCLP.

intel_generations.name: Sandy Bridge
intel_generations.igpu_notes: Native up to Catalina. Big Sur+ requires OCLP root patch. HD 3000 support limited.

amd_generations.name: Zen 4
amd_generations.notes: Requires AMD kernel patches. NootedRed for APU iGPU.

amd_generations.name: Zen 3
amd_generations.notes: Very popular. Zen 3 AMD patches mature and stable.

amd_generations.name: Zen / Zen+
amd_generations.notes: Original Zen. Still works with AMD patches.

gpu_families.name: Intel Iris Xe / UHD 750 (11th gen and newer)
gpu_families.warning: No macOS acceleration whatsoever. No workaround. Must use dGPU.

gpu_families.name: AMD RX 400 / 500 series (Polaris)
gpu_families.notes: One of the best Hackintosh GPU families. Plug and play.

gpu_families.name: AMD Radeon iGPU (APU — Vega / RDNA)
gpu_families.notes: NootedRed replaces WhateverGreen for these. Do not use both.

gpu_families.name: NVIDIA GTX 600 / 700 series (Kepler)
gpu_families.notes: Last NVIDIA with native support. Dead on Ventura+.

gpu_families.name: NVIDIA GTX 900 / 1000 series (Maxwell / Pascal)
gpu_families.notes: Web Drivers required. High Sierra and Mojave only.

gpu_families.name: NVIDIA RTX 2000 / 3000 / 4000 / 5000 series
gpu_families.warning: Completely unsupported. No drivers exist or will ever exist.

kexts.name: Lilu
kexts.description: Core kernel patching framework. Required by almost every other kext. Must be loaded first.

kexts.name: VirtualSMC
kexts.description: Emulates Apple SMC chip. Absolutely required for any Hackintosh to boot.

kexts.name: WhateverGreen
kexts.description: GPU patching for Intel and AMD GPUs. Fixes display output, HDMI audio, DRM, and framebuffer issues.

kexts.name: NootedRed
kexts.description: Enables GPU acceleration for AMD APU iGPUs (Vega/RDNA). Replaces WhateverGreen for these — do not use both.

kexts.name: NootRX
kexts.description: Enhances support for AMD RX 5000/6000 dGPUs on top of WhateverGreen.

kexts.name: CpuTopologyRebuild
kexts.description: Fixes P+E core scheduling on Intel Alder Lake (12th gen) and newer hybrid CPUs.

kexts.name: AppleALC
kexts.description: Native audio via layout-id injection. Works with most Realtek, Conexant, IDT, Cirrus codecs. Not supported on Tahoe.
kexts.tahoe_note: Broken on Tahoe. Use OCLP-Mod with lowered SIP instead.

kexts.name: OCLP-Mod (Audio fix)
kexts.description: Restores AppleHDA audio on macOS Tahoe. Requires lowered SIP (csr-active-config: 03000000). The correct Tahoe audio solution — do NOT use VoodooHDA.

kexts.name: AirportItlwm (Ventura build)
kexts.description: Native-like Intel Wi-Fi with AirDrop and Handoff. Use the Ventura build on Tahoe — confirmed working on T480.
kexts.tahoe_note: Use Ventura build on Tahoe. Confirmed working.

kexts.name: IntelBluetoothFirmware
kexts.description: Firmware loader for Intel Bluetooth. Works out of the box on most configurations.

kexts.name: BlueToolFixup
kexts.description: Required for Intel Bluetooth on macOS Monterey and newer.

kexts.name: AirportBrcmFixup
kexts.description: Enables Broadcom Wi-Fi cards (BCM94360, BCM943602, BCM94352, etc.). Needs OCLP root patch on Sonoma+.

kexts.name: BrcmPatchRAM3 + BrcmFirmwareData
kexts.description: Bluetooth firmware loader for Broadcom adapters. Include both BrcmPatchRAM3 and BrcmFirmwareData.

kexts.name: RealtekRTL8111
kexts.description: Driver for Realtek RTL8111/RTL8168 Gigabit Ethernet. Most common chip on desktop motherboards.

kexts.name: LucyRTL8125Ethernet
kexts.description: Driver for Realtek RTL8125 2.5GbE. Common on Z490, B550, X570 and newer boards.

kexts.name: IntelMausi
kexts.description: Driver for Intel Ethernet (I210, I211, I217, I218, I219). Common on Intel boards and ThinkPads.

kexts.name: AtherosE2200Ethernet
kexts.description: Driver for Atheros/Qualcomm/Killer AR816x, AR817x, Killer E220x, E2400, E2500.

kexts.name: USBToolBox + USBMap
kexts.description: Build a permanent USBMap.kext for your system. Replaces USBInjectAll after mapping.

kexts.name: USBInjectAll
kexts.description: Injects all USB ports during initial setup only. Replace with USBMap.kext after mapping.
kexts.notes: Temporary — setup only. 15-port limit on macOS 11+.

kexts.name: VoodooPS2Controller
kexts.description: PS/2 keyboard and trackpad driver. Essential for most laptops.

kexts.name: VoodooI2C + VoodooI2CHID
kexts.description: Driver for I2C HID trackpads (most modern laptop trackpads). Include both VoodooI2C and VoodooI2CHID.

kexts.name: VoodooSMBus
kexts.description: For ELAN SMBus trackpads found in ThinkPads and some Lenovo laptops.

kexts.name: ECEnabler
kexts.description: Fixes battery percentage reading on most laptops by allowing large EC register reads.

kexts.name: SMCBatteryManager
kexts.description: VirtualSMC plugin. Reads battery status and exposes it to macOS.

kexts.name: BrightnessKeys
kexts.description: Adds macOS brightness key support for laptop keyboards.

kexts.name: SMCProcessor
kexts.description: CPU temperature and frequency sensors. Intel only.

kexts.name: SMCSuperIO
kexts.description: Fan speed and voltage sensors for desktop motherboards.

kexts.name: AMDRyzenCPUPowerManagement
kexts.description: Power management and temperature readings for AMD Ryzen CPUs.

kexts.name: NVMeFix
kexts.description: Fixes power management for non-Apple NVMe SSDs. Prevents data loss and improves stability.

kexts.name: RestrictEvents
kexts.description: Blocks unwanted system processes and enables CPU name patching in About This Mac.

kexts.name: FeatureUnlock
kexts.description: Enables AirPlay to Mac, Universal Control, Sidecar, and Night Shift on unsupported SMBIOS.

kexts.name: HibernationFixup
kexts.description: Fixes hibernation and sleep/wake issues common on Hackintoshes.
